seo.description: Henrique Zimermann, a DevSecOps and SRE professional focused on Cloud, infrastructure automation, observability, and resilient architecture design.

hero.descriptionBefore: Computer Science student and infrastructure professional focused on
hero.descriptionAfter: My goal is to apply container orchestration and Cloud Native concepts to build secure, scalable, and resilient architectures.

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.description: The tools and platforms I use to deliver the best possible performance for the business.

certifications.title: Official Certifications
certifications.description: Official validation of my skills across the top cloud providers in the market.

projects.title: Hands-on Projects
projects.description: Architectures, automations, and open code I built to solve real infrastructure problems.

items.title: Serverless CI/CD Pipeline
items.description: Built a continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) pipeline using GitHub Actions, automating deployments to AWS services.

items.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
items.description: Automated cloud infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and server setup using Ansible scripts for standardization.

items.title: SRE Observability Stack
items.description: Implemented proactive monitoring for applications and infrastructure with Prometheus and Grafana, focused on defining SLIs and SLOs.

community.title: Community and Leadership
community.description: I believe in knowledge sharing and the power of communities. I actively help empower the next generation of cloud professionals.

cards.title: AWS Cloud Club Founder
cards.description: Founder of the 1st AWS Cloud Club in Southern Brazil at Univali. I organize events and support the student community in their cloud journey.

cards.title: AWS Student Builder Leader
cards.description: Official leadership recognition in the AWS Builder Students program, engaging talent and promoting a culture of technological innovation.

cards.title: Tech Events
cards.description: Active participation in major events and communities, including The Developer's Conference (TDC), DevOps Days, and AWS User Groups.

experience.title: Journey and Highlights
experience.description: My education, professional experience, and community involvement.

items.title: AWS Cloud Club Captain and Student Leader Builder
items.description: I serve as captain of Cloud Club Univali and as a student leader at Univali, managing the local academic community, fostering cloud culture, and organizing practical mentoring on Cloud Computing.

items.title: DevSecOps
items.description: Continuous security integration in the API development lifecycle. Focused on infrastructure automation, secure CI/CD pipeline management, and Cloud Native practices to ensure high availability and cloud security.

items.title: Computer Science
items.description: Computer Science student deepening knowledge in systems architecture, algorithms, and software engineering.

items.title: Infrastructure and Efficiency Projects
items.description: Developed projects focused on Docker Swarm, Cloudflare Zero Trust, and advanced PowerShell and Bash scripting to reduce manual operational tasks.

languages.title: Languages and Communication
languages.description: Operational capacity for global collaboration and native documentation consumption.

footer.title: Ready to collaborate?
footer.description: Always open to expanding my network, discussing Cloud Native architectures, or exchanging ideas about DevSecOps and scalable infrastructure. Let's connect!
